subject: Chibi-proportioned mage in iconic red hat and coat, with a floating dark ornate weapon beside them — Red Mage job class from Final Fantasy XIV
description: A small, chibi-proportioned figure stands in a confident pose wearing the signature Red Mage ensemble: an oversized wide-brimmed red hat adorned with a white feather, a layered red and black coat with gold trim, and elaborate gloves. The figure's ears are pointed and visible. Floating beside them to the upper right is a dark, ornately designed weapon. The background is a warm cream-parchment tone with no environmental detail. The figure looks upward with a jaunty tilt.
foreground: Chibi Red Mage figure in full class regalia with floating dark weapon
emotion: confident, jaunty — upward gaze and cocked pose suggest bravado
